title: Secondatia stans
taxonomy: Secondatia stans is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This family is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The genus Secondatia is part of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae, which includes several other genera of flowering plants. The exact classification of Secondatia stans may vary depending on the source and the current understanding of plant taxonomy. Further research may be necessary to confirm the most up-to-date classification.
